targets.strategy: make the original file a thin index while moving the real implementation into domain modules for rows, threads, messages, friction, transfer packets, transfer channels, coordination, collaboration, and handoffs

ownership_movement.responsibility: collaboration review, blockers, implementation, and closure

notes: Extract pure coercion and serialization first.
Split lifecycle responsibilities into bounded repositories.
Keep the compatibility index thin.
Compatibility index and facade modules are part of the output surface.
Friction and bundle lifecycle outputs are explicit modules.

sourceModel.purpose: Generate a replayable single-responsibility refactor plan from SQL-backed code metadata.

title: Replayable refactor plan for workflow_store_communication.py and ai_engine_sdk.py

scope.designIntent: Plan and execute a bounded file split from SQL metadata first.
outOfScope: broad raw file reads without wrapper justification

items.title: Establish bounded refactor intent
items.description: Confirm the governed purpose, target responsibility split, and blast-radius boundary before metadata planning or code extraction begins.
acceptanceChecks: The refactor intent states the bounded outcome, target surface, and explicit out-of-scope work.
The intended split is reviewed before any wrapper-driven extraction or edits begin.

items.title: Confirm SQL metadata split posture
items.description: Use inventory.code_files, inventory.code_symbols, inventory.code_relationships, and active codebase-shape findings to confirm the bounded split plan before any code edits.
acceptanceChecks: The source file hash, line count, symbol count, and finding refs are recorded in the plan lineage.
The split proposal identifies symbol clusters without requiring a full-file read.

items.title: Record governed retrieval steps
items.description: Define the wrapper-first extraction sequence for the target symbol groups before any fallback file inspection.
acceptanceChecks: Each target symbol group has a bounded retrieval step recorded.
Fallback full-file reads are explicitly marked as fallback-only in the plan metadata.

items.title: Extract Auxiliary Helpers helpers
items.description: Move the auxiliary helpers symbol cluster into a bounded module and keep the original surface delegating to the new module.
acceptanceChecks: The destination module contains only the auxiliary helpers concern.
The source module retains stable public behavior and delegates instead of duplicating the extracted logic.

items.title: Validate single-responsibility refactor slice
items.description: Validate focused tests, file shrinkage, and dependency integrity after the split.
acceptanceChecks: Focused tests covering the refactored file pass.
The original file line count drops or responsibility concentration measurably improves.
No handwritten DAL or raw SQL is introduced by the refactor slice.
